sections.paragraph:
adj. m.-

(1) perverse. לֵבָב עִקֵּשׁ a perverse heart, Psa 101:4, and vice versâ עִקֶּשׁ־לֵבָב a man perverse of mind, Pro 11:20 17:20 . עִקֵּשׁ שְׂפָתָיו perverse in lips, i.e. a man of fraudulent speech, Pro 19:1. Absol. deceitful, false, Deu 32:5 Psa 18:27 Pro 8:8.

(2) [Ikkesh], pr.n. m. 2Sa 23:26. Hence-
